module_mood_contract: M0 prework — mechanical readiness; not a named mood-arc module. Step 4 is the sole teaching beat (operator-first delegation + one-at-a-time push-back rehearsal). No mood contract to stew; no teaching moment to pre-empt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named.
Epistemic mood ≠ punitive mood.
Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
Strategy-fidelity check.
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
Key Concepts shape — theme breadcrumbs, not standalone section.
Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
Minimal lecturing before contrast-mood exercises.
Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text.
Cross-module artefact contracts must be explicit at both ends.
Cross-module artefact contracts — every produced file is a contract row in the maintainer block.
Pre-action framing blocks don't preview the prompt's payoff.
Cross-module structural-failure rescue callouts at module open.
No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
Question-dump default — two legal shapes.
Preamble before action — structural trigger on 4+ sub-steps.
rules_evaluated.evidence: ae101-prework-extract-and-install includes 'no preamble' inline as first instruction after framing line; structural trigger met by in-fence suppressor.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood lands: 8+/10 at every teaching beat.
rules_evaluated.evidence: trace.phases[4].mood_score=8 (sole teaching beat); close.mood_score=8. Phases 1-4 mood-exempt (setup beats).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood doesn't resolve early — no pre-emption of next module's teaching moment.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Prework is pre-arc M0; no teaching moment to pre-empt. Hands off to M1 Connections open hook.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands reliably across persona-skill variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: ae101-prework-extract-and-install encodes operator-first delegation; ae101-prework-one-at-a-time is recovery path for question-dump. Teaching moment structurally reachable for all skill levels in persona range.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity.
Module-to-module arc: close hands off to next module's open.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:51 '## Bring to Module 1' Connections question matches M1 strategy-doc open hook exactly.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing function lives in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: One-at-a-time forcing function encoded in ae101-prework-one-at-a-time prompt block (rule 16 carve-out: body callout is optional-recovery shape).
